arts.ttl: Serie A matches postponed as Italian football mourns Pope Francis
arts.sum: Following Pope Francis' death, Serie A has postponed all matches. The Vatican confirmed his passing, prompting national mourning. Fixtures will be rescheduled later.

arts.ttl: Cagliari vs. Fiorentina, a win needed
arts.sum: Cagliari are winless in their last eight games (D3 L5) against Fiorentina in Serie A and they have failed to score in six of those, including the reverse game; the last Rossoblu win against the Viola in the top-flight was in November 2019 (5-2 at Unipol Domus). Cagliari have won 18 of their 42 home games (D17 L7) against Fiorentina in Serie A: only against Sampdoria have the Sardinians collected more home wins (20/36) in the top flight.

arts.ttl: Two-week window revealed for Moise Kean release clause
arts.sum: Moise Kean has a €50m release clause in his contract at Fiorentina, amid interest from Premier League clubs. Kean is a transfer target for several leading clubs after an excellent season with the Serie A side. The 25-year-old has scored 23 goals in all competitions for Fiorentina after signing from Juventus in the summer.
